title: PMMMH Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
short_info: Pt. Madan Mohan Malaviya Hospital (PMMMH) has officially announced the Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 with 7 openings. The detailed notification was published under Advertisement No. 06/2026 on the official PMMMH website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of up to 45 years and hold an MBBS degree with PG Degree/Diploma or equivalent, and are registered with the Delhi Medical Council, can attend the walk-in interview scheduled for 02 June 2026. Direct links to download the notification and detailed recruitment information are shared below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years For Persons with disabilities (Divyangjan) candidate relaxation is admissible as per Govt. of India rules upon submission of Handicapped Certificate from the competent authority.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS with PG Degree/Diploma or equivalent, Registered with Delhi Medical Council.
qualification.details: Radiology, Anesthesia, Microbiology, Medicine: MBBS with PG Degree/Diploma or any other equivalent qualification in the concerned specialty recognized by Medical Council of India. In case PG Candidate is not available, Non-PG with at least two years experience in concerned specialty in Govt./Govt. empanelled hospital will be considered. Registered with Delhi Medical Council (only qualification incorporated in DMC will be considered) and have not completed three years Senior Residency.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the PMMMH Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The recruitment is through a Walk-in Interview, and the interview is scheduled for 02 June 2026. Candidates should attend the interview on this date with all required documents.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 7 vacancies for the Senior Resident posts at Pt. Madan Mohan Malaviya Hospital.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS with a PG Degree/Diploma or an equivalent qualification in the concerned specialty recognized by the Medical Council of India. Non-PG candidates with at least two years of experience may also be considered.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Senior Resident posts is 45 years.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the PMMMH Senior Resident recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for General/OBC and SC/ST categories for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary as per Level-11 of the 7th Pay Commission.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the PMMMH Senior Resident recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will be based on a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the Walk-in Interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview will be conducted at Pt. Madan Mohan Malaviya Hospital, New Delhi - 110017.

faq.question: Q9. Do I need to register before attending the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. It is recommended to check the official notification for specific registration procedures.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if applicable), and category certificates (if applicable).
